---

title: "MATH532 Practical 2 (Answers) — Epidemics on Networks"
output:
html_document:
toc: true
toc_depth: 3
number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
```

## Setup

```{r libraries}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(igraph)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tibble)
  library(ggplot2)
})

set.seed(124)
source("Network_model.R")
```

```{r helpers}
estimate_r_early <- function(df, t_max = 8) {
  df2 <- df %>% filter(time <= t_max)
  if (nrow(df2) < 5) return(NA_real_)
  y <- pmax(df2$prevalence, 1e-9)
  fit <- lm(log(y) ~ time, data = transform(df2, y = y))
  unname(coef(fit)[2])
}

gc_fraction <- function(A) {
  g <- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(A, mode = "undirected", diag = FALSE)
  max(components(g)$csize) / nrow(A)
}
```

---

## Section A — Epidemics across graph families

```{r A-graphs}
N <- 5000

A_er  <- Matrix(makeNetwork("rand", N=N), sparse=TRUE)

g_ws <- sample_smallworld(1, N, nei = 5, p = 0.02)
g_ws <- as.undirected(g_ws, mode = "collapse")
g_ws <- simplify(g_ws)
A_ws <- as_adj(g_ws, sparse=TRUE)

A_pa  <- Matrix(makeNetwork("prefAtt", N=N), sparse=TRUE)
A_mod <- Matrix(makeNetwork("randMod", N=N), sparse=TRUE)

graphs <- list(ER = A_er, WS = A_ws, PA = A_pa, Modular = A_mod)

TSPAN <- seq(0, 40, by = 0.1)
```

```{r A-run}
res_list <- lapply(names(graphs), function(nm) {
  A <- graphs[[nm]]
  out <- runSimulation(
    A, R0 = 2,
    frac = 0,
    removal_by = "rand",
    calib_mode = "pre_removal_biology",
    modelType = "SIR",
    T_R = 3, T_E = 2,
    TSPAN = TSPAN,
    n_runs = 3,
    seed_mode = "fixed",
    fixed_nodes = 1:10,
    n_seeds = 10,
    global_seed = 99
  )
  out$graph <- nm
  out
})

df_all <- bind_rows(res_list)

ggplot(df_all, aes(time, prevalence, color = sim)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ graph, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title="Epidemics across graph families (neutral calibration)",
       y="Prevalence", x="Time")
```

---

## Section B — Structural proxy vs early growth

```{r B-moments}
mom_tbl <- lapply(names(graphs), function(nm) {
  A <- graphs[[nm]]
  m <- neutral_moments(A)
  tibble(graph = nm, mk = m$mk, vk = m$vk, knbr = m$knbr, proxy = (m$knbr - 1))
}) |> bind_rows()

mom_tbl
```

```{r B-growth}
r_tbl <- df_all %>%
  group_by(graph, sim) %>%
  summarise(r_hat = estimate_r_early(cur_data_all(), t_max = 8), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(graph) %>%
  summarise(r_median = median(r_hat, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

r_tbl
```

---

## Section C — Two calibration modes under degree-targeted removal

```{r C-modes}
A_base <- graphs[["WS"]]
frac_vals <- c(0.0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.3)
mode_vals <- c("pre_removal_biology","post_removal_sameR0")

df_modes <- bind_rows(lapply(mode_vals, function(mode_) {
  bind_rows(lapply(frac_vals, function(fr) {
    out <- runSimulation(
      A_base, R0 = 2, frac = fr, removal_by = "degree",
      calib_mode = mode_,
      modelType = "SIR",
      T_R = 3, TSPAN = TSPAN, n_runs = 3,
      seed_mode = "fixed", fixed_nodes = 1:10,
      n_seeds = 10, global_seed = 123
    )
    out$frac <- fr
    out$mode <- mode_
    out
  }))
}))

ggplot(df_modes, aes(time, prevalence, group = sim, color = factor(frac))) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ mode, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title="Calibration modes under degree-targeted removal",
       x="Time", y="Prevalence", color="Removed fraction")
```

---

## Section D — Random vs degree-targeted removal + giant component

```{r D-gc}
A0 <- graphs[["PA"]]
removals <- expand.grid(
  frac = c(0.0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.3),
  by = c("rand","degree"),
  KEEP.OUT.ATTRS = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

gc_tbl <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(removals)), function(i) {
  fr <- removals$frac[i]
  by <- removals$by[i]
  A1 <- nodeRemoval(A0, fr, by)
  tibble(frac = fr, by = by, GCfrac = gc_fraction(A1))
}) |> bind_rows()

ggplot(gc_tbl, aes(frac, GCfrac, color = by)) +
  geom_line() + geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title="Giant component fraction vs node removal",
       x="Removed fraction", y="GC fraction")
```

---

## Section E — Ring lattice vs small-world (wavefront vs shortcuts)

```{r E-ring-sw}
nei <- 5

g_ring <- sample_smallworld(1, N, nei = nei, p = 0)
g_ring <- as.undirected(g_ring, mode="collapse")
g_ring <- simplify(g_ring)
A_ring <- as.matrix(as_adj(g_ring, sparse = FALSE))

g_sw <- sample_smallworld(1, N, nei = nei, p = 0.01)
g_sw <- as.undirected(g_sw, mode="collapse")
g_sw <- simplify(g_sw)
A_sw <- as.matrix(as_adj(g_sw, sparse = FALSE))

df_sw <- bind_rows(
  runSimulation(A_ring, R0 = 2, calib_mode = "pre_removal_biology",
                modelType = "SIR", T_R = 3, TSPAN = TSPAN, n_runs = 2,
                seed_mode="fixed", fixed_nodes = 1:10, n_seeds=10, global_seed = 7) |>
    mutate(kind = "Ring (p=0)"),
  runSimulation(A_sw, R0 = 2, calib_mode = "pre_removal_biology",
                modelType = "SIR", T_R = 3, TSPAN = TSPAN, n_runs = 2,
                seed_mode="fixed", fixed_nodes = 1:10, n_seeds=10, global_seed = 8) |>
    mutate(kind = "WS (p=0.01)")
)

ggplot(df_sw, aes(time, prevalence, color = sim)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ kind, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title="Ring wavefront vs small-world shortcuts", x="Time", y="Prevalence")
```
